name: =?utf-8?Q?Nancy=20Mace?=
subject: It's important you hear this from me - I tested positive for COVID-19
body:
Urgent from Nancy Mace - I tested positive for COVID-19 | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/b5486fa59dfb/send-a-trump-ally-to-congress-2069862?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=fbd447be79&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=b53ed454f8&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| Last night, I learned my campaign team was potentially exposed to Coronavirus last week. Out of an abundance of caution and concern for my children and my team, I was tested for COVID-19. Today, my physician administered the Abbott Sars-Cov-2 RNA ID now nasal swab rapid test and I tested positive for COVID-19 a few minutes later.

I was feeling a little fatigued with a body ache this weekend but that is kind of normal on the campaign trail. I have a slightly stuffy nose and mild body ache, but I do not have a fever or cough.

I am concerned for my two children, the rest of my team and volunteers, all of whom are like family.

In consultation with my physician, I have personally contacted every individual, to the best of my knowledge, who has been in close proximity to me over the _last week_ and may have been exposed. I have asked for and paid for my staff and volunteers to get tested immediately. All of my campaign staff and volunteers have been instructed to self-quarantine and work remotely.

My children and I will be in quarantine for the next two weeks or until I test negative for COVID-19.

Per the guidelines provided to me by my physician, I am advising for anyone whom has been in close contact with me during the _last 7 days_ . . . can and should reach out to their doctor for guidance.

For anyone who may have symptoms of COVID-19 or may have been exposed to someone with COVID-19, here are the public testing sites available in South Carolina: [https://www.scdhec.gov/infectious-diseases/viruses/coronavirus-disease-2019-covid-19/covid-19-screening-testing-sites](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=2804ca1db6&e=f1831b4ca2)

Lastly, I wanted to share some inspiration that came to me today in a tender moment with my 13 year old son, who put his arm around me and said this, "Mommy, it's going to be ok... We're all going to be fine..."

To all those who have been affected by COVID-19, I continue to keep you in my thoughts.

Sincerely,

---
| |
---
| Please be advised, Rep. Mace will not be doing press for the next 48 hours. And all public events over the next 14 days are being rescheduled. For any other inquiries, please contact her campaign manager mara@nancymace.org or 843.580.6223.
---
| [ ](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=3cae637a9d&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| **[WEBSITE](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=6b5de88548&e=f1831b4ca2) | [FACEBOOK](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=a09d2c03b6&e=f1831b4ca2) | [TWITTER](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=12e513147f&e=f1831b4ca2) | **[**DONATE**](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=200582a10b&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
|

name: RapidResponse@MarkWarnerVA.com
subject: Mark Warner has an opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Mark officially has an opponent, and this race will be critical
|
---

| | | **"Daniel Gade wins Republican Senate primary in Virginia"** -- Associated Press
---

Big news, Derek --

Mark officially has an opponent! Virginia Republicans held their primary tonight and chose the candidate who'll challenge Mark in November. The Republican Party of Virginia has a track record of picking extreme conservatives who are out of step with Virginians -- Mark's new opponent, Daniel Gade, is more of the same.

**In 2014, the GOP came within _one percentage point_ of defeating Mark, and they don't want to lose again.** Even with a hardcore pro-Trump nominee like Gade, we already know that this race could be **_very_** close. This year they'll pull out all the stops to win Mark's seat, take back the Senate, and re-elect Donald Trump.

Mark is determined to stop them, but to do it we need your help. We need 1,000 more members of this team to donate now and make sure we have the resources we'll need to keep Mark in the Senate this November. **Can we count on you to pitch in today to help us reach this critical goal?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d404/53d9897e/54a8b947/1c8845e9/2548651982/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYyMSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-ppnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20200623_f_1_nd__621__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")**

clean_body: Mark officially has an opponent, and this race will be critical | | | | "Daniel Gade wins Republican Senate primary in Virginia" -- Associated Press Big news, Derek -- Mark officially has an opponent! Virginia Republicans held their primary tonight and chose the candidate who'll challenge Mark in November. The Republican Party of Virginia has a track record of picking extreme conservatives who are out of step with Virginians -- Mark's new opponent, Daniel Gade, is more of the same. In 2014, the GOP came within one percentage point of defeating Mark, and they don't want to lose again. Even with a hardcore pro-Trump nominee like Gade, we already know that this race could be very close. This year they'll pull out all the stops to win Mark's seat, take back the Senate, and re-elect Donald Trump. Mark is determined to stop them, but to do it we need your help. We need 1,000 more members of this team to donate now and make sure we have the resources we'll need to keep Mark in the Senate this November. Can we count on you to pitch in today to help us reach this critical goal? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" "" As coronavirus still rages throughout the country, re-electing a leader like Mark who'll put Virginians first couldn't be more important -- especially with the President and Mark's new opponent undermining important public health efforts to stop the virus. Meanwhile, Mark is fighting for access to affordable health care, secure elections, and an economic recovery that works for everyone. But to keep making progress on these critical issues he needs to win again this November. "" -- Team Warner "" | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Team Hagerty
subject: #TeamHagerty Shares Hagerty Statement On Facebook, Sen. Cotton Tele-Town Hall
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-e-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-tl/) June 23, 2020 **Hagerty Releases Statement On Facebook** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-r/) Bill released a statement this morning on an explosive [investigation reveal](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-y/)[ing](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-j/) that Facebook employees were flagging and deleting posts in support of President Trump to undermine the 2020 presidential election. No social media platform should be the arbiter of what's true and what's not. In the Senate, Bill will continue to stand with President Trump and Senator Marsha Blackburn to ensure conservatives' voices are protected from biased social media platforms. You can read Bill's full statement on our website **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-t/)** **ICYMI: Tele-Town Hall With Sen. Tom Cotton** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-i/) Senator Tom Cotton (AR-R) joined #TeamHagerty for a tele-town hall last week. Sen. Cotton has endorsed Bill's campaign for U.S. Senate. You can listen to the full tele-town hall to hear Bill and Sen. Cotton talk about holding China accountable for their cover-up of the Wuhan coronavirus and holding the Senate majority by clicking above or******[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-d/)** **READ: Hagerty On The Right To Life** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-h/) Bill released his latest editorial in the _Jackson Sun_ last week. The op-ed reinforces Bill's position as 100 percent pro-life. The right to life is enshrined in our First Amendment, and Bill believes it is our Constitutional duty to be a voice for the voiceless. In the Senate, Bill will fight first and foremost to stop the taxpayer funding of abortions across the country, which begins with defunding big abortion businesses like Planned Parenthood once and for all. You can read the full editorial [**HERE**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-k/) and Bill's blueprint to protect the right to life **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-u/)**
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-m/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-c/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-q/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[Tennessean:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-a/) Tom Cotton endorses Bill Hagerty in Tennessee's Republican US Senate primary****[TNJ:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-f/) New Hagerty ad touts business experience (and Trump)****[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-z/) Bill Hagerty Gets Tom Cotton Endorsement and Releases New TV Ad****[Columbia Daily Herald:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-v/) Local opinion: Meet Bill Hagerty, Trump's choice in Tennessee's U.S. Senate race****[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-e/) U.S. Sen. Tom Cotton Lays Out Evidence of China's Role in Spread of COVID-19 During Tele-Town Hall with Bill Hagerty****[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-s/) Bill Hagerty Comments on U.S. Supreme Court DACA Decision**
## **What They're Saying...**
> _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-g/) _" Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families."_
> [-Lara Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-w/) _" Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man."_
> [-Donald Trump Jr.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-yd/)_" Bill has been a good friend, he was a great ambassador to the US in Tokyo and he is going to be a fantastic senator. If there is one word I would use to describe Bill it's fearless. Bill helped solidify and strengthen our relationship with Japan which is absolutely essential to us standing up to China. Believe me, I can tell you that Beijing noticed the minute Bill got on the ground."_
> [-Sen. Tom Cotton](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-yh/) _" Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!"_
> [-KT McFarland](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-yk/) _" We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud."_
> [-Marilyn Musgrave](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-yu/) _" We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revival. That's why we need Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Larry Kudlow](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-jl/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-jr/) _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-jy/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-jj/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-jt/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-ji/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-jd/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-jh/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-jk/)
---|---|---|---|---

Nashville, TN 37215

[Preferences](https://hfs.updatemyprofile.com/t-ptydily-76178D70-fuutjhhtj-tt) | [Unsubscribe](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-u-ptydily-fuutjhhtj-ti/)

name: Tony Gonzales
subject: Military Leaders Urge Support for Tony Gonzales on July 14th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Gonzales for Congress**
body:
|
---
| | |
---
---
| |
---
---
| | | June 23, 2020 Dear Friend,

Veterans and their families are one of our nation’s most precious communities. You have unselfishly committed yourselves to serve and have done so humbly, honorably and without reservation. That is why we wanted to reach out and introduce you to Tony Gonzales, who is running for Texas’ Congressional District 23 (the seat currently held by retiring U.S. Congressman Will Hurd).

We know firsthand the sacrifices that come with years of dedicated service to country and the challenges faced upon returning home in sometimes new and unfamiliar situations. Challenges such as employment, medical and mental health care, education, and family support. We also know Tony Gonzales.

Tony is a _**20-year veteran**_ of the United States Navy, who rose to the Navy’s highest enlisted rank of Master Chief Petty Officer. Tony was born in San Antonio and was raised in San Antonio and Edwards County. He entered the Navy at age 18, without a high school diploma, but he has since earned his college degree and is now completing his Ph.D. During his time in service, he deployed multiple times in support of combat operations in Iraq and Afghanistan. He was the boots on the ground facing the most serious of situations an individual can face.

Tony is both a _**devoted family man and a man of faith**_. He will tell you that throughout his time in service, his wife, Angel, a veteran herself, was the true hero. Finding the strength and perseverance needed to raise their six children and making the house a home. Trust us when we say that Tony recognizes the strain and sacrifice made by veterans and their families. He is keenly aware of the importance of addressing those sacrifices and ensuring their unique needs are not neglected.

Many of us served as senior military leaders, and we held an uncompromising responsibility to the more than 2.1 million active and reserve component service members and 2.6 million family members. We made the toughest of decisions, the toughest of which was sending people into harm’s way. We need a leader who knows how to make tough decisions. A leader who is truly _**an authentic, competent, and courageous person**_. Tony Gonzales is that person for all the 1.5 million Texan veterans, the 21 million veterans nationwide, and their families. The Navy does not select someone to be a Master Chief Petty Officer without such qualities!

As we have gotten to know Tony, we know he will be the kind of Member of Congress who first listens to our veterans, their families, and then drives necessary policies that will positively reinforce their distinct situations and needs. He will be your strongest advocate and we encourage you to meet and get to know Tony, the husband, the father, the veteran.

_**We would like to ask you to join us in supporting him now in the Republican run-off on July 14th and again during the November general election**_. We are including details on how you can help.

Thank you in advance for your time and consideration. We look forward to hearing from you. Respectfully,
---
---
---
**[WEBSITE](https://tonygonzales.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jktyydjl-olulttitiy-i/) | [FACEBOOK](https://tonygonzales.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jktyydjl-olulttitiy-d/) | [TWITTER](https://tonygonzales.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jktyydjl-olulttitiy-h/) | [INSTAGRAM](https://tonygonzales.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jktyydjl-olulttitiy-k/) | **[**DONATE**](https://tonygonzales.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jktyydjl-olulttitiy-u/) **Paid for by Tony Gonzales for Congress**

name: Eric Trump
subject: Exclusive offer attached 📎

You know where Margaret stands—she fights every day to protect our waters—thanks for standing with us!

Team Good [Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17987310/213462802/1073285021?refcode=em06242020&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODczZDk2OC0xM2I2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M-hfyw1xbUSKMC5tOz7kt4GxFz9ToLO0L3frEZT2_Lw=)

| Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. _We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us._

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. **[If you'd like to donate, click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17987311/213462803/788213855?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODczZDk2OC0xM2I2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M-hfyw1xbUSKMC5tOz7kt4GxFz9ToLO0L3frEZT2_Lw=)**

Democrats know what’s at stake in the Granite State. Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/389e058bf45bf946/85430281301bccacc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, The Democrats are desperate to win a majority in the Senate, and they know that hinges on New Hampshire. The fact of the matter is that if I win this seat and oust Jeanne Shaheen, they have ZERO chance of flipping the Senate. **We have an opportunity right now to show the D.C. swamp rats that folks are ready for a change in New Hampshire**. It’s our final end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline before the primary, and I’m asking you to chip in now. We need to make a strong statement that Granite Staters are ready to FIRE Senator Shaheen. **[Will you donate $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or what you can before midnight on June 30th?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/389e058bf45bf946/04f625f145c5a869c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** We are going to be in trouble if the Democrats are able to win a majority. They are determined to grow government bureaucracy and turn America into a socialist nation. I built my business from scratch, so I understand that government doesn’t create jobs — people do. The government should remove obstacles so that small businesses and families can preserve their American Dream. President Trump has endorsed my campaign because he knows that I’m the best candidate to fight back against the Washington establishment and Keep America Great. Will you stand with the President and support my campaign? [Stand with Pres. Trump! Donate $5 >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/389e058bf45bf946/670ac852f8f661d3c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Stand with Pres. Trump! name: Josh Hicks
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Friends —

I wanted to take a moment to thank everyone who participated in our Kentucky primary election — whether you voted absentee, voted today, or volunteered in person or remotely.

Now, more than ever, we know how important it is that everyone’s voices are heard.

For all the volunteers who texted, called, and dropped off yard signs, you made a tremendous difference. To all the donors who chipped in, you’ve enabled us to run the type of people-focused campaign that we always hoped to be able to run.

Your participation in our democracy strengthens it — at a time when we need it the most.

I owe you a tremendous debt of gratitude. It’s my privilege to be in this race, and I have all of you to thank.

In these challenging times, the energy and idealism I have seen from you make me more excited and optimistic about the future of our Commonwealth and our country.

Thank you.

Josh

Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
Josh Hicks for Congress
PO Box 1214
Lexington, KY 40588
United States
Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney.

He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. Please consider making a $5 contribution to Josh’s campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks_eoq2?refcode=20200624_em_non_primaryty_all_ptftr]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks_eoq2?refcode=20200624_em_non_primaryty_all_ptftr2]

name: Coalition for American Veterans
subject: It is time to stand up for our nation’s Veterans
body:
Our Vets deserve better! When you go to the polls, don’t forget about the Veterans who sacrifice so much.
| [ ](https://hs-6023921.t.hubspotstarter-ir.net/e2t/tc/VWT94684_YcYW4SX6kN4GdZ3tW430FVB4bKgJ2N8tN9Ck3lGmQV1-WJV7CgHYrW1D-qVw4g4dp4W68GpcB8Mcm6TN1wN8gR8x6JhN2Ph7VcgJtj7W8gLp-85rnwdcW5kNm3w45TD9nW3yHgGj56d8DvW2yLF5H5RP2QFW8z-WpL2yTS15W2ctLSX1wDjhGW6S_8HY3F2SsXW8kRrZK9lhkNcW8CdyLT2phMSzW9jNGKs7SzNRyW4YPrkv2hh-kMVTzDdg7XKdrYW466j3X5gTqdyW5sxZbk8DK7m6W7t8Scq1YsQJKW35czCB2x4yLVW12Q6FV7xRnSsW3qz2Vl7vs8rL3dXK1)
---
|
---
Hey Peter, This month feels like there is a lot of uncertainty in the world today. For veterans affected by the coronavirus pandemic, it’s somewhat comforting to know that there are [relief programs in place](https://hs-6023921.t.hubspotstarter-ir.net/e2t/tc/VWT94684_YcYW4SX6kN4GdZ3tW430FVB4bKgJ2N8tN9Br5kbT5V3Zsc37CgSBNW1-CWf760xZHcW2-W3Zx63CkTXW2h12zT6WZ_FsW8WjbTH8cj6fXW9bvdnC6fxdMYW5cfGBR3MB7cdW67Gydp1_n693W5gRf0Y5pvBxHW4PJYwQ21ltTnW7MS70F2QVGVRW4YF2Vv3qKdl6W7WF2HT4X_fLWN3ZqH30HSxrsW6Br4ZP5485wpW1Mk7Xr37Zz9lW54rvlW6lm51GW3n6VYg5qjFrNN4C54BJjGxnyW8WLHWY753c5HW88j68M7Sp1VBW81xB844ZXNkVW3pmWsZ3pjRXbMJDJW05_LlQVbS94C9hy_2ZW3rVNRF7L-btcW3bpHfK1tv2l2W8g5pGN3RJm2dW29485V2G27QSW4r89D53n-k0FW1wv-6F4gcK-RW8CW-q_6JJ9vnW4BFLqX1qxXx02VX1). As we approach the November election, for Veterans – and for every American – the 2020 presidential election will be one of the most crucial elections in American history. The person elected to be the President of the United States needs to have the best interests of the country and its citizens at heart at all times. [You may have seen headlines describing presumptive Democratic candidate Joe Biden as “sleepy” or “dazed and confused”.](https://hs-6023921.t.hubspotstarter-ir.net/e2t/tc/VWT94684_YcYW4SX6kN4GdZ3tW430FVB4bKgJ2N8tN9CX3lGnpV1-WJV7CgSG5W318RKC63XDFRW772F9b8cnF2QW5J21qr2km2f9W5D8Ss96cNFxCW6wB9m372rpPwW3hdct72kYDnqW2S17t_4FyK6pW2697fl2Vtj26W3PPj8Q73vxJqW9gbllP8kljYTVKLT6H1nM8L-N64t4Rv5zlbJW9m3TTR4r7zWDW6G654P1BN0W1W7lPMg561svDKW3cB_3W9dt1bJW3yqGLT5pqjltW90-Lpb6qq94fN8bVfFg3jDhwW8jSJmV49KLZ_VRqWPF5cCBLlW8zn8CP7qTmFrW8S1Ln-4cfZgWW7Kztw57w6MsRW6P8nkd986dFkW5bYSHz6HH95y3n5z1) Is there any truth to these? And what could they mean for the upcoming presidential election? Is presumptive Democratic presidential candidate Joe Biden the right person to do this job? The truth is, America needs a leader who is confident in his leadership skills and ability to connect with people. **This does not describe Joe Biden.** **Voters should think twice before voting for Joe Biden in November.** When it comes to women’s issues, Joe Biden is untrustworthy and hypocritical. [He is not the right person to be in charge of protecting the interests of female veterans.](https://hs-6023921.t.hubspotstarter-ir.net/e2t/tc/VWT94684_YcYW4SX6kN4GdZ3tW430FVB4bKgJ2N8tN9CX3lGnpV1-WJV7CgTtrW822xlH926krgVbjVgz1pCbhsN2M-3cBJJmcsW8J-Y2K60zfqYVdDM7M6GH9lKW4L322K4ZJ4HQW8vnDPD5hqrShW1tqqLw2_n3X4VwwKP_4D_yvcW47CYGk8x51ZGW3hWXJG6gb0YsW5HjllT1vWsx-W1zwsjF122RzKW1f2TVV9g3t28W4pX8_z18PP2bVWQn4X8LBGRlW6l-JR46gRnH0Vs5Dd15SqjzqW5-cbxy70w7tdN5D3McKY004gW4dPTLx57PFRFW59C8cB3XD_pHW7dsGpJ5tKR3GW4HLCcw2-NB5pW4DWJ4H8wt4gGW8JGdC-45_9VR3d_C1) In the coming month, Coalition for American Veterans will continue to support and stand up for ALL veterans. **Thanks for your support!** PS: Are you on "Team Vets"? clean_body: Our Vets deserve better! When you go to the polls, don’t forget about the Veterans who sacrifice so much. | | Hey Peter, This month feels like there is a lot of uncertainty in the world today. For veterans affected by the coronavirus pandemic, it’s somewhat comforting to know that there are . As we approach the November election, for Veterans – and for every American – the 2020 presidential election will be one of the most crucial elections in American history. The person elected to be the President of the United States needs to have the best interests of the country and its citizens at heart at all times. Is there any truth to these? And what could they mean for the upcoming presidential election? Is presumptive Democratic presidential candidate Joe Biden the right person to do this job? The truth is, America needs a leader who is confident in his leadership skills and ability to connect with people. This does not describe Joe Biden. Voters should think twice before voting for Joe Biden in November. When it comes to women’s issues, Joe Biden is untrustworthy and hypocritical. In the coming month, Coalition for American Veterans will continue to support and stand up for ALL veterans. Thanks for your support! PS: Are you on "Team Vets"? name: Team Eugene
subject: June is Pride Month! Join us in taking action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
We’re standing with our LGBTQ+ family, neighbors, and friends here in PA and across the country this Pride Month by calling on the Senate to pass the Equality Act now.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17993326/213563248/2127758081?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmUxOGE3MS0zNmI2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A6YeTcS7aJe-1cl8YhcK1OdoQJaJlXB-I7OAiqeMGmM=&emci=e8f57819-29b6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=afe18a71-36b6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=10203249) Team,

Last week, the Supreme Court ruled that existing civil rights protections apply to LGBTQ+ Americans, meaning that no one can be fired for who they are, how they identify, or who they love. And in just a few days, we’ll mark the fifth anniversary of the Supreme Court ruling that made marriage equality the law of the land.

**These landmark decisions represent much needed progress for our country, and we should celebrate these victories. But we must also remember that there is still work to do.** Last year, House Democrats passed the Equality Act, which would go even further and outlaw discrimination based on sexual orientation and gender identity, but Mitch McConnell _refuses_ to bring it to a vote.

[**We’re standing with our LGBTQ+ family, neighbors, and friends here in PA and across the country this Pride Month by calling on the Senate to pass the Equality Act now. Sign our petition to join us >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17993327/213563249/2127758081?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmUxOGE3MS0zNmI2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A6YeTcS7aJe-1cl8YhcK1OdoQJaJlXB-I7OAiqeMGmM=&emci=e8f57819-29b6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=afe18a71-36b6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=10203249) | [Pass the Equality Act](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17993328/213563250/2127758081?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmUxOGE3MS0zNmI2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A6YeTcS7aJe-1cl8YhcK1OdoQJaJlXB-I7OAiqeMGmM=&emci=e8f57819-29b6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=afe18a71-36b6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=10203249)
---

When the White House announced earlier this month that they were rolling back health care protections for LGBTQ+ Americans, it meant giving health insurance companies and health care providers the ability to discriminate freely about who they treat and what they cover.

**Not only did they make this announcement in the middle of Pride Month, they did so in the face of a global pandemic._How shameful_.**

[**Will you stand with us in calling on Mitch McConnell and the Senate to pass the Equality Act now to end this kind of rampant discrimination and ensure full equality for all Americans?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17993329/213563285/2127758081?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmUxOGE3MS0zNmI2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A6YeTcS7aJe-1cl8YhcK1OdoQJaJlXB-I7OAiqeMGmM=&emci=e8f57819-29b6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=afe18a71-36b6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=10203249) [Add my name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17993330/213563342/2127758081?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmUxOGE3MS0zNmI2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A6YeTcS7aJe-1cl8YhcK1OdoQJaJlXB-I7OAiqeMGmM=&emci=e8f57819-29b6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=afe18a71-36b6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=10203249)

Thank you,

Team Eugene
__Eugene DePasquale is running for Congress to represent Pennsylvania's 10th district. name: Jennifer Carroll Foy
subject: I'm running to become Virginia's first woman governor, and here's why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
body:
We need a governor who knows the struggles of having nothing -- yet still gives everything.

|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17994679/213584542/1293463565?refcode=jcf_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzExNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmRmNjA0ZS0zZWI2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6M7CPJ1Evgo5rZpbnpFi-L8H9jPpwox8YL6b6Dgv0rM=)

| | _“If you have it, you have to give it.”_ That’s the earliest lesson my grandmother taught me. It’s guided me my entire life. I was raised by my grandparents in Petersburg, a poor city falling prey to the opioid epidemic and gun violence. We didn’t have much. **But we had food and shelter, so we gave it.** I can’t remember a time when there wasn’t someone experiencing hardship from our community sleeping in our home. I was told to my face that women were biologically, mentally, and emotionally inferior, and could never succeed at a male-dominated school like the Virginia Military Institute. I didn’t have support beyond my family. **But I had strength and tenacity, so I gave it.** Soon after the Supreme Court struck down VMI's male-only admission policy, I applied, worked hard, and blazed a trail as one of the first women to graduate from VMI. I was told not to run for the Virginia House of Delegates in 2017. They told me that the Democratic Party had already chosen their candidate, that I couldn’t flip this seat. You can imagine what they told me when they found out I was pregnant with twins. **But I had vision and experience, so I gave it.** I spoke with voters of all political parties, waking up to morning sickness and then walking miles on swollen ankles to knock doors. That November, I flipped the district red-to-blue, and was later sworn in as a Delegate with my twin sons in my arms. Since then, I haven’t stopped giving my all. I championed the Equal Rights Amendment, expanded healthcare, and fought for the rights of workers, families, and our environment. **But the truth is, I have more to give.** [**That’s why I need you -- will you support me in bringing true representation and service to Richmond?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17994680/213584543/-2014617412?refcode=JCF_EM_FR_2006_Onboard1Grandmother&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzExNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmRmNjA0ZS0zZWI2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6M7CPJ1Evgo5rZpbnpFi-L8H9jPpwox8YL6b6Dgv0rM=) | | | [Chip in $25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17994681/213584544/-2014617412?refcode=JCF_EM_FR_2006_Onboard1Grandmother&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzExNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmRmNjA0ZS0zZWI2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6M7CPJ1Evgo5rZpbnpFi-L8H9jPpwox8YL6b6Dgv0rM=)

---
I’ve served as Delegate long enough to know that politics as usual is not serving the people. No more corporate agendas: we need affordable healthcare, stronger unions, and better gun violence prevention. **We need a governor who knows the struggles of having nothing -- yet still gives everything.**

When I was in high school, my grandmother suffered a stroke and became paraplegic. We had to decide whether to pay the bills or buy her life-saving medication.** All the while, my grandmother carried the spirit of her lesson, giving what she had. **
I carry that spirit with me every day. With your help, I’ll carry it to the highest office in the Commonwealth. [**Will you give what you can today and help me lead Virginia with compassion?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17994687/213584550/2065692798?refcode=JCF_EM_FR_2006_Onboard1Grandmother&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzExNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmRmNjA0ZS0zZWI2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6M7CPJ1Evgo5rZpbnpFi-L8H9jPpwox8YL6b6Dgv0rM=)
| | [Chip in →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17994688/213584551/-2014617412?refcode=JCF_EM_FR_2006_Onboard1Grandmother&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzExNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmRmNjA0ZS0zZWI2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6M7CPJ1Evgo5rZpbnpFi-L8H9jPpwox8YL6b6Dgv0rM=)
---
I’m with you,
Jennifer Carroll Foy

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Who will stand up to AOC in Congress?
body:
Last night, AOC won her primary despite the best efforts of the old school Democrats to primary her out.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381202-898206-5058217-32710a814b-e7237407b8)
Patriot,

name: Greg Stanton
subject: Did you hear Donald Trump's speech last night?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Yesterday, Donald Trump came here to Arizona to try and argue for his re-election.
**[Donald Trump thinks he can win in Arizona-- Donate to help me make sure that does not happen »](https://act.myngp.com/el/VBbXZSDc2B1KC8zn0lsdxqXy2X6-YznLiETgncb9Q9Q=/a6-Ho4ttnsnkoOqu4F56jCnidt4qkHsXMFXqN8FP0mA=?refcode=X_062420_TrumpinPHX_B&amount=25)**

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/VBbXZSDc2B1KC8zn0lsdxqXy2X6-YznLiETgncb9Q9Q=/a6-Ho4ttnsnkoOqu4F56jCnidt4qkHsXMFXqN8FP0mA=?refcode=X_062420_TrumpinPHX_B&amount=25)

* * *
Yesterday, Donald Trump came here to Arizona to campaign -- while we are still facing a growing pandemic, a worsening economic depression, and fracturing relations within our communities.

**Not only was Trump 's speech insensitive to the millions of Arizonas who are experiencing hardship right now, but his rationale for re-election was flat-out wrong.**

Trump tried to say he's made life better for Arizona families -- but in reality his failed leadership has damaged our healthcare system, our economy, and has divided our country.

**We need to defeat Donald Trump in November and it starts-and-ends here in Arizona, which is _the tipping point state_ in the Electoral College.**

That's why I am devoting my campaign between now and Election Day to driving up voter turnout here in Maricopa County in November, which will be crucial for helping us defeat Trump in Arizona.

[**Will you donate today to help me invest in flipping Maricopa County blue in November >>>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/VBbXZSDc2B1KC8zn0lsdxqXy2X6-YznLiETgncb9Q9Q=/a6-Ho4ttnsnkoOqu4F56jCnidt4qkHsXMFXqN8FP0mA=?refcode=X_062420_TrumpinPHX_B&amount=25)

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/VBbXZSDc2B1KC8zn0lsdxqXy2X6-YznLiETgncb9Q9Q=/a6-Ho4ttnsnkoOqu4F56jCnidt4qkHsXMFXqN8FP0mA=?refcode=X_062420_TrumpinPHX_B&amount=25)

Together, we can build a better future for every Arizonan!

\-- _Greg_

Susan

body:
Will you watch & share these new ads highlighting Joe's record?
#
_Peter, we hope you and your family are staying safe and healthy. This morning, we released THREE new ads highlighting Joe Biden 's record of economic leadership. Joe Biden is the president we need to lead us through this economic crisis and rebuild our country. He's done it before. He'll do it again. Check out our new ads:_
* * *
**Watch & Share**
Our new TV ad, "Timeline," reminds voters how Vice President Biden and President Obama brought our country back with 14 million new jobs, a rescued auto industry, 6 million Americans kept out of poverty and the longest period of job growth on record after the Great Recession.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Bryant?=
subject: ICYMI: 500 Words
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bill Bryant**
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | In April 2018, at the suggestion of several supporters, I emailed my first “500 Words”, an update of what I’m doing, reading and thinking about, and said I’d do it again if enough people wanted me to. Scores responded “yes”, so I sent a second, and people asked me to keep ‘em coming. Here’s No. 5 [**You can access previous editions here.**](https://twitter.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c5ac11f23df6ef9dfb9e604c5&id=28855a4b95&e=ef726ca89e)

This edition is a bit different: it focuses entirely on what I’m thinking.

You are receiving this because at some point you were identified as a supporter, someone who wants to keep in touch, or you asked to be added to the list. If you know somebody who would like to receive this, have them email me at [**billbryantwa@gmail.com**](mailto:billbryantwa@gmail.com). If you want to unsubscribe, please click the unsubscribe link at the bottom.
---
| |
## **WHAT I'M THINKING**
---
| The state has less money because of the COVID-19 lockdown. To deal with the shortfall, the governor has cancelled some raises and asked departments to identify 15% budget cuts. Democratic leaders are proposing new taxes. Some legislators are calling for a special session.

As I watch the unfolding scene, I wish I could call Governor Inslee and offer my thoughts. But as his former opponent, I don’t think he would welcome my call. I’m hoping you will call.

Why now? Because even with reduced revenues, at the end of 2020 the state will still collect over 10% more than it did just four years ago. That balance does not require across-the-board budget cuts, certainly not new taxes. Across-the-board cuts shield our elected officials from the flak that comes with making the hard decisions about what’s important. We elect them to make those decisions and now is the time for them to do it. This fall in revenue provides them the opportunity to reset priorities, update how government delivers services, and make investments that propel our state forward.

Now is not a moment for lazy budget tinkering. Now is the moment to break new ground.

The governor should be exploring how innovation & technology could enable us to deliver better services, faster. He should determine which programs are truly helping people, and not cut them but increase their funding if more funding will provide more help. He should decide which programs and agencies to eliminate.

Let’s put everything on the table.

This is our moment to ask whether Washington needs 298 school districts, each with their own administrative overhead, or whether money spent on redundant administration could be better spent by principals on teachers and students. This is the time to ask whether we need a Department of Ecology and a Department of Natural Resources and a Department of Fish and Wildlife. It is the time to spotlight which funds spent by the Department of Social and Health Services are helping people, and which are feeding a bureaucracy.

This is our moment to invest in projects that provide jobs and strengthen our state now and into the future. We should build a Columbia Science Center in the Tri Cities that, with Battelle, US Department of Energy, Delta High School, colleges and universities, will be our campus for environmental, climate, energy and modular nuclear education and research. We should build a new SR18 four-lane freeway connecting I-90 (North Bend) to I-5 Dupont (south of Fort Lewis), and a third Clark Co. bridge across the Columbia River. We should build water reservoirs in the Cascades. Now is the moment to provide every child with basic medical and dental care, and only fund those homelessness programs proven to lift people off our streets.

This requires an entirely new budget and government.

Legislators cannot reprioritize and restructure government in a special session. That can only be done by a governor who opens the session with a plan he has already built support behind. Imagine, done right, a special session could be our launch pad. The governor needs to hear that with so many people struggling financially, now is not the time for a special session that lunges us backward into more taxes, more bureaucracy.

Now is the time to Break New Ground. #BreakNewGround \- Bill
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: 200 Miles of Border Wall and Counting
body:
"Under the leadership of President Donald J. Trump, the operational environment of the Southwest Border has been completely transformed" | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5a85da1fba&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **200 Miles of Border Wall and Counting**

“Under the leadership of President Donald J. Trump, the operational environment of the Southwest Border has been completely transformed,” Acting Commissioner for U.S. Customs and Border Protection Mark Morgan writes in _Townhall._

“Open borders play right into the hands of the cartels. Without the border wall system, crime and gang activity goes up as drugs, and other contraband make their way north into the homeland.”

[Click here for more about the state-of-the-art border wall.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1e4af90f8c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| Peer-reviewed studies have shown that the American Bar Association’s ratings for judicial nominees grades Republican-nominated judges more harshly than Democratic ones. “So it is all the more extraordinary that President Trump’s judicial appointments have earned the ABA’s ‘Well Qualified’ rating at nearly the highest rate in five decades,” Assistant Attorney General Beth Williams writes in [_National Review_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a3b3eeb150&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Hilario Yanez, a Dreamer who was brought to the country illegally as a toddler, told ‘Fox & Friends Weekend’ on Sunday that he supports President Trump’s bid to end the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals [DACA] program in favor of broader reform” to our immigration system, Talia Kaplan writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d07fb0be8d&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “To counter China and Russia, two great-power competitors, U.S. forces must be deployed abroad in a more forward and expeditionary manner than they have been in recent years. This is the main reason the U.S. will reduce its permanently stationed force in Germany,” National Security Adviser Robert O’Brien writes in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d74de9900e&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b5117f509e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a07fa4e509&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=036a366b76)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: Last night’s results are just the beginning
body:
Peter,

I want to thank you again for your hard work, your continued support, and your tireless efforts to build and grow this movement. This has been a long, hard-fought race, and we knew that with over 70,000 ballot requests, it would also be a long process to ensure that every vote is counted.

But every single voice must be heard -- that was the driving force behind this campaign, and it’s why we must continue to patiently await the final outcome. Last night was only just the beginning, and as the remaining mail-in ballots are counted over these next few weeks, I remain hopeful that our vision for change will win the day.

Thank you,
Adem

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Donald Trump won't let up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We have to be prepared.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8070%2E868730%2ETl9M-U) Friend, You've seen the tweets, and you've read the headlines from the past few months -- you know what's at stake: [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9068?t=4&akid=8070%2E868730%2ETl9M-U) There is no leadership coming from the White House -- none, zero, zip, _nothing_. Just tweets, threats, and attacks, over and over and over again. If you want a preview of what this fall might look like, you've got it -- strong, steady leadership from Jay Inslee versus the erratic name-calling of Donald Trump. Let's be clear: Donald Trump isn't going to let up nor will his friends in the Republican Governors Association. That's why President Trump won't stop targeting me and the leadership we're showing in Washington state on COVID response, civil rights, and peaceful protesting. **[To be ready for the fight again, we need to raise $50,000 by our June 30th end-of-month deadline to be prepared to fight back: Will you donate $5 or more to help hit our goal? name: Bruce, Campaign Manager
subject: our path forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| |
Derek,

**_Mark officially has a Republican Senate opponent:_** Daniel Gade.

I'm going to outline our plan to defeat Gade and re-elect Mark Warner this November, but first I want to briefly tell you why that is so important. Mark's opponent has spent his entire campaign up to this point convincing voters that he will be a 100% reliable vote for the Trump agenda. We have every reason to believe him. From Gade's opposition to Medicaid expansion, which has given health care to hundreds of thousands of Virginians, to saying Trump's "leadership" on coronavirus "has been great," Gade has been in lock-step with the Trump agenda. That's why it is so important we do everything we can to help re-elect Mark this November.

**Derek, I want to thank you for everything you've done for this campaign. We can't slow down now -- we've got to carry the momentum to November 3rd.**

As Mark's campaign manager, it's my job to consider all the possible outcomes. And I'm always reminded of what happened in 2014: Mark's Republican candidate exceeded even Republicans' expectations, beat his polls and came within _one percentage point_ of unseating Mark. To make sure that doesn't happen again, we need to run the most sophisticated campaign the Commonwealth has ever seen. And the fact is, coronavirus and the important social distancing measures present a major challenge that will require big investments in digital tools and other innovative methods of turning out voters for Mark Warner and Democrats up and down the ballot.

**[Your support will be crucial to running that sophisticated campaign. So, can you help us hit our end-of-month goal of 1,000 new donors by pitching in today? With the Republican primary over, they'll be sending every dollar and cent they have to Mark's new opponent so they can flip this seat.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d406/53d9897e/54aa20c5/1c884489/170123476/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYyMyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-ppnd?refcode=20200624_f_1_nd__623__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

The path to a Democratic Senate starts right here in our Commonwealth, but this will not be an easy fight. If we want to turn the Senate blue, we'll need to first defend this seat with everything we've got.

**[Hitting our end-of-month goal of 1,000 new donors is the next step in our plan to re-elect Mark Warner and keep Virginia blue.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d406/53d9897e/54aa20c5/1c884488/170123476/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYyMyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-ppnd?refcode=20200624_f_1_nd__623__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thank you for your tireless support!

-- Bruce Sinclair, Campaign Manager

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d406/53d9897e/54aa20c5/1c8844f7/170123476/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYyMyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-ppnd?refcode=20200624_f_1_nd__623__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**

| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17998644/213668086/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjM5ZDBiMC01ZWI2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A40-J43Vg1XOSh5pSLF-2KyKnSOsq9mfL6g1qePnbsQ=&emci=a830af43-54b6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=a639d0b0-5eb6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *
Friend --

The last few days have displayed some of the worst leadership I’ve ever seen.

As our state continues to see a sharp rise in the number of COVID-19 cases, with hospitals reaching capacity and surging case numbers, our elected officials continue to fail their responsibilities.
> **First: Our state officials made moves to quickly reopen our state against the recommendations of medical professionals.
>
> Now: Despite the fact that Houston is one of the nation's largest COVID hotspots, the Trump Administration announced this morning that it would be pulling essential life saving health care resources from our city.
>
> Next: Even as we’re in the middle of a global health crisis, our state officials will move forward tomorrow with a lawsuit to dismantle the Affordable Care Act. An effort, that if successful, will result in an estimated 2 million Texans (and 23 million Americans) losing access to health care.**
These actions aren’t just dangerous, they’re utterly disgraceful. Texans can’t afford this blatant disrespect any longer, and that’s why I’m running to be your next Congressman. [**But I can’t win in November without you. Our team has an incredibly important deadline coming up in 7 days. Can I count on you to chip in $15 right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17998645/213668087/2147176479?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.24_SKP_b1_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjM5ZDBiMC01ZWI2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A40-J43Vg1XOSh5pSLF-2KyKnSOsq9mfL6g1qePnbsQ=)
| [Chip in now ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17998646/213668088/1700156400?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.24_SKP_b1_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjM5ZDBiMC01ZWI2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A40-J43Vg1XOSh5pSLF-2KyKnSOsq9mfL6g1qePnbsQ=)
---

Health care access is personal to me. I know what it’s like for families to have their life turned upside down by a medical crisis. As a college student, my father was diagnosed with terminal cancer, and I dropped out of school to help my family provide him with the best possible care we could afford.

It was one of the most painful moments of my life, friend, and it's a story too common for Texas families.

We need elected officials who are in our corner. Ones that are ready to fight tooth and nail for us, and stand up to those who put their interests above the common good.

As your Congressman, I will be that fighter for TX-22 families. That’s my promise to you.

[**If you’re with me in this movement to weed out government corruption and stand up policies that work for all Texans, I hope you’ll consider making a small grassroots donation to our campaign’s upcoming FEC deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17998647/213668089/2147176479?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.24_SKP_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjM5ZDBiMC01ZWI2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A40-J43Vg1XOSh5pSLF-2KyKnSOsq9mfL6g1qePnbsQ=)

name: Kathy Manning
subject: Debunked:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Trump's false accusations are just another form of voter suppression.
|
---

| | His motives are transparent -- President Trump is blatantly stirring up doubt about the integrity of voting by mail. **But Trump 's false critiques have been repeatedly debunked. Voting by mail is a time-tested process -- _so much so that Trump himself has voted by mail._** Trump wants to weaken the voting rights of Americans for his own political gain. And Republicans are limiting polling place locations for primaries across the country, predominantly in Black communities. I'm in this race to protect the voting rights of _all_ North Carolinians -- but I can't do it without your help. [_**In less than a week, we have a big FEC deadline. Every dollar we raise helps us strengthen our grassroots organization, connect with voters before Election Day, and strengthen our fight for North Carolina. **_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2d0/3d199a51/2f448cfb/7364d0bb/1891476501/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDYyNCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZCJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200624?refcode=kme200624_nd_other&refcode2=17426") [_**If you can, please chip in now before the FEC deadline ->**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2d0/3d199a51/2f448cfb/7364d0bb/1891476501/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDYyNCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZCJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200624?refcode=kme200624_nd_other&refcode2=17426") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $10](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2d0/3d199a51/2f448cfb/7364d0bb/1891476501/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDYyNCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZCJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200624?refcode=kme200624_nd_other&refcode2=17426")

name: Darin LaHood
subject: I know this isn’t politically correct
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
Defunding our police departments only invites more danger into our communities and makes America less safe – and less free. [ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=be6152193e8544dfa7ae623328f4e27c&_e=DDpBcbTiPtByLyWKZXjhvH4_gtBe8IwN97TmAQRUEnawKTLac2esXYn-IyvWpOTr4SjvpfSwD-_ISyL95nGW0a1ZII0AJFYrm6RAFbXOPsWlJutF9kFGQ36fGuZiYgCazwvdQMhPAIEVW8679E_TEba__kx03YFCC2I_4t_ZFtnHFIXV_VTK-kTrVi3T9qe5r4JeE8rJByuKUBOh8227rs4tgqTAEBYrf030DpjeaVidgs5qfdfAqyR4wspGaaldQj8SAcF0zZFKVmo02R-nravcHuU3cnJH16lhqz_ZWpovbfZLpf5rbpy3s4gDJ5MsLcFDyY758t1auKhnbxm51eM8_nzPRvEx_KMjXAydfD7QGYEJ-G97OmlM5VQjuNObQi0v9LpZCZy0LRKSaqcPmmTORnKY2HEVwmVnmrYPRy1_su0zEwg0gGuk9ophf4RlIbyM07yI4jvnxvEcJAtfjckxH1uumFvtff0c0sUmqnA%3D) | |
---
Friend,

**Democrats in Congress think they’re doing our country a favor by rallying to defund our police departments and leaving our communities to fend for themselves.**

Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer have the privilege of private security details – something that single moms, vulnerable children, and victims of domestic violence don’t have.
[**ADD YOUR NAME: BACK OUR MEN AND WOMEN IN BLUE**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=be6152193e8544dfa7ae623328f4e27c&_e=DDpBcbTiPtByLyWKZXjhvH4_gtBe8IwN97TmAQRUEnawKTLac2esXYn-IyvWpOTr4SjvpfSwD-_ISyL95nGW0a1ZII0AJFYrm6RAFbXOPsWlJutF9kFGQ36fGuZiYgCazwvdQMhPAIEVW8679E_TEba__kx03YFCC2I_4t_ZFtnHFIXV_VTK-kTrVi3T9qe5r4JeE8rJByuKUBOh8227rs4tgqTAEBYrf030DpjeaVidgs5qfdfAqyR4wspGaaldQj8SAcF0zZFKVmo02R-nrbwOVDJxN2x9NA80i3WS9KbX8_w925LfkMpAu1ov6BNePlh0RNqOBQ-U__ZPvP7ThzZhotpwUrUsEghIviFCK8WMIojm4AGCNj5aIT5LdxeBEdwrXmx1exyW7smmTtmZdBUU--w1SVi1jxR1LKWSZ63PTSy6uKar90luXm79sf5F1SuSbvUs9LFEZ3q68SClN-IHFBbUk9d25OP4Gb-_Y1c%3D)
Defunding our police departments only invites more danger into our communities and makes America less safe – **and less free.**

I’ve always believed that we don’t know how good something is until it’s gone.

**That applies to police officers, and we can’t afford to defund our police departments while leaving vulnerable Americans at the hands of lawless criminals.**

I’m proud to stand by our police officers – even if it’s not politically correct – because it’s the right thing to do. Friend, will you stand by me with our police officers?
[**ADD YOUR NAME: BACK OUR MEN AND WOMEN IN BLUE**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=be6152193e8544dfa7ae623328f4e27c&_e=DDpBcbTiPtByLyWKZXjhvH4_gtBe8IwN97TmAQRUEnawKTLac2esXYn-IyvWpOTr4SjvpfSwD-_ISyL95nGW0a1ZII0AJFYrm6RAFbXOPsWlJutF9kFGQ36fGuZiYgCazwvdQMhPAIEVW8679E_TEba__kx03YFCC2I_4t_ZFtnHFIXV_VTK-kTrVi3T9qe5r4JeE8rJByuKUBOh8227rs4tgqTAEBYrf030DpjeaVidgs5qfdfAqyR4wspGaaldQj8SAcF0zZFKVmo02R-nrTCqn_MkVrAUHdjvf184sNr-L0MHBUtO4PK9lOfaoFzDw5p0m0y9mosjW1kWwIg-3MvJGpWBCAc4IjBvSbc21Br2E_P4cJxku_kYumqfwDLpC7c6joiiAA_9HgiQRhHDh47-RuW98NKDVtbzgou6-CZnpV_h8XogCYIuKajTRLxxaAo1oxFetnIsXeTyKiQgIJFDF7qBemMawbhN9NEyc8k%3D)
Thank you,

Darin LaHood

body:
|
#

body:
show your support for Janet Barresi | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6ab576412bf5/calling-all-patriots-12545942?e=795c6d9796)

---
| | FINAL CANDIDATE FORUM TONIGHT AT 7:00 PM ON NEWS 9
---
| | Peter,

**Tune in tonight at 7:00!**

We will be having our **final candidate forum for Oklahoma's 5th Congressional District at 7:00 pm** and I'll be bringing the MAGA message to the airwaves.

Tune to [NEWS 9 ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=b3d22f204d&e=795c6d9796)at 7:00 pm to hear why I am the best chance at beating Kendra Horn and sending President Trump a true conservative ally in Congress.

It will also be [**streamed at the top of our Facebook page**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=c228a434dd&e=795c6d9796)!
---

---
| **Early voting starts tomorrow morning at 8.[Find your polling place here.](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=21cfc203e9&e=795c6d9796)** We're coming down to the wire, and our momentum is at an all-time high.

If you'd like to get involved with our campaign in these final few days, **we'd love to have you on board!** [**Sign up to volunteer here.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=8800b0dd80&e=795c6d9796)
Thanks so much and God bless.

See you tonight!

[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=f07ea3e731&e=795c6d9796)

body:
| Derek-- Did you see my email from yesterday? Outside groups are RIGGING our New Hampshire primary -- unless we stop them before they make a mess. **We've only got hours left before the Triple Match expires to fill our Election Integrity Fund and prepare to fight back.** ****Can you chip in at all before midnight tonight? ****[TRIPLE MATCH: Voter Integrity Fund (secure link)](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDUwODY1Mjg2MDA4ODA0NTg3JmM9eDZhMyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNjIyMzkxNzQmZD1iMno0aDlr.W1IQOUt84_1MTtEQYRUwm9ggnraCv6-xJBTPHMTg1Kk "TRIPLE MATCH: Voter Integrity Fund \(secure link\)")**** ****Thank you,
-Matt
\---------------------------------------- From: Matt Mayberry
Subject: voter integrity
Date: Tuesday, June 23, 2020 Derek-- It's been widely reported by Fox News that **DC groups are trying to rig our primary election here in the Granite State.**

As I told Fox News, I'm running the same election strategy Donald Trump did in the 2016 presidential primary. Trump disregarded the Washington establishment who wanted Jeb Bush, and he spoke directly to the citizens of New Hampshire.

Long story short, **they're trying to rig our elections** \-- and frankly, that's offensive to me and it should be to you.

Last week, we launched our Voter Integrity Fund to fight back, and we were BLOWN AWAY at the results.

**Even better, we received a TRIPLE MATCH offer from a major donor who has agreed to help us fight back, but only for contributions made through midnight tomorrow!**

**[TRIPLE MATCH: Voter Integrity Fund (secure link)](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDUwODY1Mjg2MDA4ODA0NTg3JmM9eDZhMyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNjIyMzkxNzgmZD14MWU1ZDNy.RqYxZ5HhUDr94v6P4yk3MasnLS7kZEvQI2RQPyUpoP8 "TRIPLE MATCH: Voter Integrity Fund \(secure link\)")**

We don't have a lot of time to fight back against these MASSIVE groups, but we DO have the grassroots support from Granite Staters like you.

Our New Hampshire values are at stake. Please do what you can today!

-Matt Mayberry | |

clean_body: "" "" Donald Trump won in Montana by about 20%, but Democrat Steve Bullock was reelected as Governor. Now, he's running for Montana's Senate seat, and Cook Political Report just updated his race to "toss up!" Team -- Democrats need to flip FOUR SEATS to win the majority, and one of them can be Montana. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Steve Bullock and Maggie Hassan. "" "" "" "" Montana will be an uphill battle. Far-right Republican Steve Daines has a well-funded campaign, and McConnell and his corporate special interests will stop at nothing to keep this seat in Republican hands. Winning this race and flipping the Senate will come down to people like you giving whatever you can. "" Thank you -- your help is so important. ""

subject: Lebron James just EVISCERATED racist Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by the Congressional Black Caucus PAC
body:
Lebron James just dropped a major truth bomb about racist voting practices! (MUST SEE >>>>>>>) |
---
| [_WE 'RE IN AWE: _NBA All-Star Lebron James just CALLED OUT America 's racist voting practices:__](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bdd6/693e3cfe/4d94ff8c/3a04e0d2/2301442319/VEsH/?g=iRqZOt8pCaBe6wkNseiFmTA "https://go.cbcpac.org/page/s/Agree-With-Lebron-James?source=MS_EM_PET_2020.06.24_B3_Agree-With-Lebron-James_X__F1_S1_C1__all") [](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bdd6/693e3cfe/4d94ff8c/3a04e0d2/2301442319/VEsE/?g=iRqZOt8pCaBe6wkNseiFmTA "https://go.cbcpac.org/page/s/Agree-With-Lebron-James?source=MS_EM_PET_2020.06.24_B3_Agree-With-Lebron-James_X__F1_S1_C1__all") [1OO,OOO SIGNATURES NEEDED: Add your name if you agree with Lebron James right away ->](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bdd6/693e3cfe/4d94ff8c/3a04e0d2/2301442319/VEsF/?g=iRqZOt8pCaBe6wkNseiFmTA "https://go.cbcpac.org/page/s/Agree-With-Lebron-James?source=MS_EM_PET_2020.06.24_B3_Agree-With-Lebron-James_X__F1_S1_C1__all") | [I AGREE WITH LEBRON JAMES ➞](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bdd6/693e3cfe/4d94ff8c/3a04e0d2/2301442319/VEsC/?g=iRqZOt8pCaBe6wkNseiFmTA "https://go.cbcpac.org/page/s/Agree-With-Lebron-James?source=MS_EM_PET_2020.06.24_B3_Agree-With-Lebron-James_X__F1_S1_C1__all")
---
America's voting system is severely broken.

Republicans have gotten away with stripping voting rights away from Black Americans FOR CENTURIES. Here's how:

\-- Closing polling locations in Black neighborhoods
\-- Unfair voter ID laws
\-- Racial gerrymandering

This is a dark fact that NEEDS more attention.

That's why we're so glad that celebrities like Lebron James are calling out America's racist voting practices. [If at least 1OO,OOO anti-racist, pro-voting rights Democrats sign to agree with Lebron, we can fuel our movement to end Republican voter suppression and boost Black Voter turnout ->](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bdd6/693e3cfe/4d94ff8c/3a04e0d2/2301442319/VEsD/?g=iRqZOt8pCaBe6wkNseiFmTA "https://go.cbcpac.org/page/s/Agree-With-Lebron-James?source=MS_EM_PET_2020.06.24_B3_Agree-With-Lebron-James_X__F1_S1_C1__all") | [I AGREE WITH LEBRON JAMES ➞](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bdd6/693e3cfe/4d94ff8c/3a04e0d2/2301442319/VEsA/?g=iRqZOt8pCaBe6wkNseiFmTA "https://go.cbcpac.org/page/s/Agree-With-Lebron-James?source=MS_EM_PET_2020.06.24_B3_Agree-With-Lebron-James_X__F1_S1_C1__all")
---
As long as Republicans continue upholding their racist voting practices, Black voter turnout will remain threatened.

That's why we must speak out against racist voting practices!

[If you agree with Lebron James that the way we vote is structurally racist, click this link to sign the petition: _https://go.cbcpac.org/Agree-With-Lebron-James_](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bdd6/693e3cfe/4d94ff8c/3a04e0d2/2301442319/VEsB/?g=iRqZOt8pCaBe6wkNseiFmTA "https://go.cbcpac.org/page/s/Agree-With-Lebron-James?source=MS_EM_PET_2020.06.24_B3_Agree-With-Lebron-James_X__F1_S1_C1__all")

Together against racism in our voting system,

_Congressional Black Caucus PAC_

| This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[ Click here to receive fewer emails.](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bdd6/693e3cfe/4d94ff8c/3a04e0dd/2301442319/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=iRqZOt8pCaBe6wkNseiFmTA "https://go.cbcpac.org/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bdd6/693e3cfe/4d94ff8c/3a04e0dc/2301442319/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=iRqZOt8pCaBe6wkNseiFmTA "https://go.cbcpac.org/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

The Congressional Black Caucus works to increase the number of African Americans in the U.S. Congress, support non-Black candidates that champion our interests, and promote African American participation in the political process.

We're committed to getting African Americans and non-Black allies elected to the highest positions in Congress and activated at the polls to advance issues that matter in our communities.

By joining this grassroots movement, you are helping uplift African Americans in the political process. Our campaign is powered by supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to combating the Trump Administration and promoting African American participation in the political process. If you'd like to donate to our campaign, [please click here.](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bdd6/693e3cfe/4d94ff8c/3a04e0de/2301442319/VEsHBA/?g=iRqZOt8pCaBe6wkNseiFmTA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms_cbc_footer?refcode=MS_EM_FR_2019.02.26_X_Footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The only way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Our next FEC fundraising deadline is this Tuesday. We have less than a week to hit our goal. After we release our fundraising numbers, the whole world will see how strong our movement is. Let's show | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852508f/45c30650/1c903b203/66e993f8/3510042664/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
There's only one way we're going to win in 2020.

There's only one way we can make the big, structural change we need in 2021 and beyond.

There's only one way we'll be strong enough to root out corruption, level the playing field for working people, and make our country work for everyone, not just a thin slice at the top.

To make it all happen, we need to keep growing our grassroots movement -- and that comes with the support of grassroots donors like you.

**Our next FEC fundraising deadline is this Tuesday. We have less than a week to hit our goal. After we release our fundraising numbers, the whole world will see how strong our movement is. Let's show them that we're ready to fight and win.

[If you're in a place where making a financial contribution makes sense, please chip in $2 or whatever you can to support our re-election campaign, help elect Democrats up and down the ballot, and fight for the bold reforms that we need as a country.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852508f/45c30650/1c903b203/66e993fb/3510042664/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUzE3Rl9FT1FfTEFVX0VfMjAyMDA2MjRfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jun20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS17F_EOQ_LAU_E_20200624_V1S1_P")**

I'll be the first to say it: the past three months haven't gone the way any of us planned. But they've shown how many reasons we have to stay in the fight.

The pandemic revealed all the cracks that working people can slip through. And it shined a light on how our system has failed to protect communities of color in particular.

Righteous protesters all over the country have brought us to a moment of serious soul-searching as a nation -- a moment to grapple with, and root out, systemic anti-Black racism and white supremacy.

It's never been more important to win in 2020, at every level -- from state houses to the White House -- but we can't stop there. After November, we won't be able to put up our feet. We'll need to keep fighting side by side for big, structural change.

And that takes a grassroots movement.

As Warren Democrats, we'll keep fighting so that families can get through this crisis in the short term and build economic security for the long run. We'll keep working to elect Democrats who understand that we need to tackle the problems we face head on, instead of just nibbling around the edges. And we'll lay the groundwork for victories in 2021 and beyond.

**We've got a plan to get this done -- but it's only possible with supporters like you, and it starts with hitting our fundraising goal before Tuesday's big FEC deadline.

[If you can, will you make a contribution today? Anything you can chip in would make a real difference -- and it would be a sign that we're all still in the fight.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852508f/45c30650/1c903b203/66e993fb/3510042664/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUzE3Rl9FT1FfTEFVX0VfMjAyMDA2MjRfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jun20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS17F_EOQ_LAU_E_20200624_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852508f/45c30650/1c903b203/66e993fb/3510042664/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUzE3Rl9FT1FfTEFVX0VfMjAyMDA2MjRfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jun20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS17F_EOQ_LAU_E_20200624_V1S1_P")
---

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852508f/45c30650/1c903b203/66e993ee/3510042664/VEsEDQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852508f/45c30650/1c903b203/66e993d1/3510042664/VEsEDA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852508f/45c30650/1c903b203/66e993d0/3510042664/VEsFBQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852508f/45c30650/1c903b203/66e993d3/3510042664/VEsFBA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852508f/45c30650/1c903b203/66e993d2/3510042664/VEsFBw/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852508f/45c30650/1c903b203/66e993d5/3510042664/VEsFBg/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")
