name: =?utf-8?Q?Senator=20Markey=20&=20Future=20Generations?=
subject: Future Generations Endorses Senator Markey for Massachusetts!
body:
Environmental and Indigenous Rights Organization,Future Generations, Endorses Ed Markey for U.S. Senate! | | | |
---
| | |
#### Joining Sierra Club and Sunrise Movement
# [POLITICO: **FUTURE GENERATIONS BACKS MARKEY**](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=08e30ebbcc&e=66979298f9)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=801e79e493&e=66979298f9)
---
|
#### _“I am elated to have received the endorsement of Future Generations,” said Senator Ed Markey. “The group and its members understand the importance of a Green New Deal and electing candidates who will work to address the climate crisis with the urgency it requires, so that tribes, and the rest of the planet can truly thrive for years to come. It is my honor to fight for Indigenous peoples in the Senate and I will continue to protect and champion the causes they care for during the next six years.”_
---
| [CONTRIBUTE FOR THE FUTURE](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=0dd323ba26&e=66979298f9 "CONTRIBUTE FOR THE FUTURE")
---
|
---
|
---
|
### **Senator Markey is a climate action champion**
Senator Markey has served in the United States Senate since winning the special election in 2013 and has amassed a deep record on environmental, climate, gun safety, and consumer protection issues.

He co-authored the Green New Deal, and his leadership has led to legislation to address the humanitarian crisis on the southern border, protect LGBTQ+ rights, and ensure that Donald Trump cannot launch a nuclear first strike without Congressional approval. Raised in Malden, Ed Markey has always stood up for the priorities of Massachusetts.

_“Senator Markey's record, commitment, and leadership on climate action exemplifies our values. Authoring the Green New Deal with climate activists to address the most critical issue of our lifetime has made him a target for special interest groups looking to silence the environmental movement. We are proud to endorse Senator Markey and are ready to stand by this climate champion in the Senate.” - Roza Calderon, Executive Director_ Senator Markey's senior seat in the Senate is the most important and crucial to protect to make sure we keep the GND alive!

[Can we count on you to join us, Sierra Club, Sunrise Movement, along with many environmental groups nationwide who have lined up to defend Senator Markey from special interests who are trying to eliminate climate action at the source?](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=5039d58dda&e=66979298f9)
---
|
---
| [DONATE TO KEEP GND ALIVE!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=a1c9b17be6&e=66979298f9 "DONATE TO KEEP GND ALIVE!")
---
|
---
| _"I confidently endorse Senator Markey in partnership with Future Generations PAC. He dedicated the last 30+ years of his life to standing up for future generations and most recently was the Senate leader that co-sponsored the Green New Deal. He will continue to be a voice for justice alongside our Indigenous communities."_

\- Patsy Doherty, Indigenous People Vote Director, Member of Makah Tribe

FUTURE GENERATIONS will focus on GOTV efforts in partnership with a nationwide network of activists, organizers, environmental groups, indigenous leaders, communities, and organizations.
---
| [INVEST IN INDIGENOUS GOTV!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=b866edda9c&e=66979298f9 "INVEST IN INDIGENOUS GOTV!")
---
| | **[READ THE FULL PRESS RELEASE HERE:](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=5a5533b1d2&e=66979298f9)**
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=b0d7fd5224&e=66979298f9)
---
| | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=8ea224e7d5&e=66979298f9)
---
| | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=f0ec46f3d9&e=66979298f9)
---
| | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=69af630722&e=66979298f9)

Future Generations PACPO Box 1861Olympia, WA 98507-2394

subject: Pass it on...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
I'll be the first to tell you how proud I am to be a House Democrat -- especially in times like these. The coronavirus crisis has placed long-standing systemic issues under the national spotlight -- including Americans' unequal access to health care.

That's why House Democrats just introduced legislation to strengthen the Affordable Care Act. While the Trump Administration attempts to dismantle the ACA, House Democrats are standing firm to defend reliable, affordable, and accessible health care for each and every American. NO ONE should be denied health care due to pre-existing conditions like diabetes, cancer, or asthma.

That's why I promise that as long as I'm in Congress, I will work tirelessly to defend the ACA -- but to do that, I need to win re-election in November.

Can I count on you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign to help keep me fighting for the ACA in Washington?

Thank you,

-- Linda Sánchez

----------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
----------------------------------------

Stand with Sánchez
415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States

| | Hey team,

Earlier this week, President Trump went on a rant about vote-by-mail that could only be called “unhinged.” He claimed – [without evidence](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18000780/213724228/-203362318?refcode=EM_FR_B1_062420_AC_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjM0OTU4ZC03N2I2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s_WbvPauKQor6-c5xiUyhbOQyXif-Gnfz6d0gPdLTGw=) – that millions of ballots across America, specifically in Colorado, were fraudulent.

Michael is standing up for voting rights and fighting back:
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18000781/213724229/-203362318?refcode=EM_FR_B1_062420_AC_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjM0OTU4ZC03N2I2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s_WbvPauKQor6-c5xiUyhbOQyXif-Gnfz6d0gPdLTGw=)

[We can’t let these baseless attacks suppress the vote in Colorado or any other state. Can you chip in $5 to help Michael fight back against Trump?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18000782/213724230/-203362318?refcode=EM_FR_B1_062420_AC_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjM0OTU4ZC03N2I2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s_WbvPauKQor6-c5xiUyhbOQyXif-Gnfz6d0gPdLTGw=)
| | [CHIP IN TO FIGHT BACK >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18000783/213724231/-203362318?refcode=EM_FR_B1_062420_AC_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjM0OTU4ZC03N2I2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s_WbvPauKQor6-c5xiUyhbOQyXif-Gnfz6d0gPdLTGw=)

Trump also claimed this week that he “almost won” Colorado, but the only thing that kept him from doing so was (nonexistent) widespread ballot fraud.

[This, of course, is false. What really propped up Trump in places like Colorado were millions of dollars of dark money in ads across the state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18000784/213724232/-203362318?refcode=EM_FR_B1_062420_AC_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjM0OTU4ZC03N2I2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s_WbvPauKQor6-c5xiUyhbOQyXif-Gnfz6d0gPdLTGw=)

[Democrats in Colorado are up against that same network this year, and we need your help to fight back against Trump’s divisive slander.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18000785/213724233/-203362318?refcode=EM_FR_B1_062420_AC_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjM0OTU4ZC03N2I2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s_WbvPauKQor6-c5xiUyhbOQyXif-Gnfz6d0gPdLTGw=)

name: Finance Team (via ChristyForCongress.org)
subject: We were downgraded TWICE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| [](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba4d/29776869/9da2612/569ec3ea/244670180/VEsH/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/")
---

| | Here's the deal, Peter --

The end of the quarter is on the 30th, and it's a _major_ fundraising deadline for our grassroots campaign. Our first for the general election. **But to be honest, we're falling short of our goal.**

Last month our race was downgraded by campaign experts -- _twice_. This month, we have to step it up.

That means we need to do more than meet our $50,000 end-of-quarter goal. **We have to crush it.**

**[Anything you're able to give will help push us over the finish line and build up the momentum we need to win in November. Can you chip in $5 or more right now so we don't fall behind?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba4d/29776869/9da2612/569ec3eb/244670180/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjRfZW9xMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200624_eoq2-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba4d/29776869/9da2612/569ec3e4/244670180/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjRfZW9xMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200624_eoq2-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba4d/29776869/9da2612/569ec3e5/244670180/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjRfZW9xMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200624_eoq2-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")

[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba4d/29776869/9da2612/569ec3e6/244670180/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjRfZW9xMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200624_eoq2-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba4d/29776869/9da2612/569ec3e7/244670180/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjRfZW9xMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200624_eoq2-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba4d/29776869/9da2612/569ec3e0/244670180/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjRfZW9xMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200624_eoq2-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba4d/29776869/9da2612/569ec3eb/244670180/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjRfZW9xMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200624_eoq2-full")
It's critical to the success of this campaign that we make a strong showing with our end-of-quarter fundraising -- because Mike Garcia and his Republican boosters will get to see our numbers. We _have_ to show them that this grassroots team is only getting stronger, and that we have the momentum we need to win.

**It's time to show Garcia, his rich and powerful allies, and everyone else _exactly what we're made of._**

**[Show our opponents that we have what it takes to send Garcia packing. Chip in $5 or more towards Team Christy's end-of-quarter goal -- before time runs out.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba4d/29776869/9da2612/569ec3eb/244670180/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjRfZW9xMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200624_eoq2-full")**

We got this,

Lexie

Finance Director
Christy Smith for Congress

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba4d/29776869/9da2612/569ec3eb/244670180/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjRfZW9xMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200624_eoq2-full")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this battleground House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba4d/29776869/9da2612/569ec3eb/244670180/VEsHBA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjRfZW9xMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200624_eoq2-full")

name: MJ Hegar
subject: This is our biggest test yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890186/7f51f7bc/414fa667/4ef6c6ff/455371816/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter -- I wanted to check in before this week's big FEC deadline.

Look, the finance report we're about to file isn't just a legal formality. Potential supporters all over Texas and across the country will use our report to determine whether we stand a real fighting chance of retiring Sen. Cornyn in November.

I know we do. This team has created an incredible opportunity to defeat him -- but we have to seal the deal. That means we've got to meet every single goal we set. **Will you help us reach our 1,000 new* grassroots donor goal and prove that our team has what it takes to defeat Sen. Cornyn?** **[PITCH IN](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890186/7f51f7bc/414fa667/4ef6c6fe/455371816/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1OTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqdeadline?refcode=email_20200624.2nd__1593__&amount=10")** We've met every goal so far with our team of over _42,000 donors_ pitching in an average online donation of just **$23** at a time. But this is our biggest test yet. So, if you can, I'm going to need each of y'all to step up and help give our campaign the resources and momentum we need to win big in November.

**Please pitch in now to help us reach our 1,000 new* grassroots donor goal and prove we can flip Texas and the Senate this November.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny 6/23
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
[](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jktyfz-uunkhiuw-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| Friends, I've had another excellent week on the road meeting great conservatives across our state. This past week back on the road, I enjoyed spending time in Hamilton, Marion, Dickson, Rutherford, Warren, White, Hamblen, and Hawkins Counties. I hope you'll join me at one of our next townhalls near you. Over the past week, I've continued to hear why we must stand with our law enforcement and support them in the face of this looting and rioting. I have taken care of many police officers in my career, and they put their lives on the line every single day. I will always stand with law enforcement. What is also concerning is the liberal hypocrisy that we are seeing at every corner. You can't go to church, but this looting and rioting is okay? [Watch my new ad here!](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jktyfz-uunkhiuw-j/) [](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jktyfz-uunkhiuw-t/) **Events:** This week, I'll be doing townhalls in Marshall, Bedford, Franklin, Polk, Monroe, and Cheatham Counties. I'll be sharing why I'm running for Senate and taking your questions. I hope you'll join us! Stay up to date with where we'll be next at [DrMannyForSenate.com/Events](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jktyfz-uunkhiuw-i/). **News:** Last week, I was incredibly proud to receive my good friend State Representative Jay Reedy's endorsement. I'm honored to be supported by him, and great conservatives from around the state. This race is Tennessee versus DC, and I'm humbled to have the outpouring of support from Tennesseans like Representative Reedy. Additionally, I'm happy to announce that State Senator Frank Niceley has endorsed our campaign. Senator Niceley has been a champion of the conservative cause and I'm honored to receive his endorsement. I'm proud to have supported our President from the beginning. Check out the Leaf Chronicle to see why a President Trump Supporter will be voting for me: **Social Media:** Thank you to the folks that came out to our townhalls last week to support me and my run for US Senate. We had many great crowds just like this one in Warren County. It's going to be a great Summer and I look forward to seeing you out on the road! Keep an eye on our [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jktyfz-uunkhiuw-d/) and [drmannyforsenate.com/events](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jktyfz-uunkhiuw-h/) to see where I'll be next! Follow us on [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jktyfz-uunkhiuw-k/), [Twitter](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jktyfz-uunkhiuw-u/), and [Instagram](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jktyfz-uunkhiuw-o/) to keep up with all that we are doing during this pandemic. We aren't slowing this campaign down as we work towards victory in August! I believe Tennesseans should meet their next US Senator, and why I hope to see you soon. Dr. Manny P.S. There are only 43 days until Election Day![ A donation right now will help me reach the US Senate and be a true representative of YOU, instead of a Washington insider. ](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jktyfz-uunkhiuw-b/) [DoNATe herE](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jktyfz-uunkhiuw-n/) Copyright © 2019 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 |

Genevieve is working around the clock to take back the House from the radical Left, so I wanted to reach out to you in the hope that **you could help make her 34th birthday extra special today**.

Defending our shared conservative values means everything to Genevieve, and nothing would make her happier than seeing how many grassroots conservatives stepped up today to help send her to Washington.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Why all the emails
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
If it helps, I really do write all of these emails myself. And like you, I get a lot of emails everyday. That's why I like to cut through the "sky is falling" rhetoric and tell you the facts about why Elissa Slotkin for Congress | | | |
---

| | Heads up -- my team and I are about to be sending you an email every day for the next six days. But we promise, it's for a good reason! **Tuesday, June 30th marks the second end-of-quarter federal fundraising deadline of 2020.** I don't use exaggerated goals or fake deadlines to raise money, but given we're just four months away from the election, this one really does matter.
* **This is one of our final chances to show the grassroots strength of our campaign, and discourage conservative outside groups from spending money on ads attacking me in the fall. **After June 30, we publicly report what we raised over the past three months, and I want to show that I have the lion's share of grassroots support.

* **I don 't take corporate PAC money, so I rely on the support of folks like you**. Our campaign is fueled by small dollar donations -- in fact, 88% of our contributions are $100 or less.

* **If it helps, I really do write all of these emails myself. **And like you, I get a lot of emails everyday. That's why I like to cut through the "sky is falling" rhetoric and tell you the facts about why your contribution matters.

So I'll get straight to the point, if you're able to, **you can click [here](https://secure.elissaforcongress.com/page/m/7ec72e02/4e5e63e6/7498f1ba/6d2a8ce6/311961843/VEsH/?g=sbLwD1Nw52hePREDDGBmRZA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22020?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.24_b1_es_reactive&amount=28") to donate.** | [ Contribute ](https://secure.elissaforcongress.com/page/m/7ec72e02/4e5e63e6/7498f1ba/6d2a8ce6/311961843/VEsE/?g=sbLwD1Nw52hePREDDGBmRZA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22020?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.24_b1_es_reactive&amount=28")
---

Thanks for your patience this week, I really can't do this without you!

\- Elissa

---
| | |
---

---
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan's 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on [Facebook](https://secure.elissaforcongress.com/page/m/7ec72e02/4e5e63e6/7498f1ba/6d2a8ce7/311961843/VEsF/?g=sbLwD1Nw52hePREDDGBmRZA "https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkinforcongress") and [ Twitter.](https://secure.elissaforcongress.com/page/m/7ec72e02/4e5e63e6/7498f1ba/6d2a8ce4/311961843/VEsC/?g=sbLwD1Nw52hePREDDGBmRZA "https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin")

| | |
---

P.O. BOX 244, HOLLY, MI 48442

name: Chris Jacobs
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, WE DID IT! We brought our message of strong conservative leadership to the voters of Western New York, and they responded by overwhelmingly putting their trust in me for both the Special and Primary Elections. I want to thank the voters of Western New York for their trust and reiterate my commitment to each of you that I will fight for you and our region in Congress. This was a long campaign, and there certainly have been many changes and obstacles, but my mission to fight alongside our President for Western New York has not changed. I am honored to have had President Trump's endorsement - he put his trust in me early and has been a staunch supporter of mine - I could not be more thankful for his support, and I look forward to supporting him as a member of Congress. [Read me my full statement here. ](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/YaTVqvqKpHpkw7AlaA9BkA/vApq8926892xsxkDPxMa2Q5wKw) I want to take a moment to also thank every single supporter and volunteer who put in long hours of hard work to make this victory happen; we couldn't have done this without you - I am deeply grateful. We have 132 days until November 3rd, and we have to make sure that we stay strong so that we not only keep this seat in strong Republican hands but that we ensure a new Republican Majority in Congress for President Trump. It's time to get to work! Sincerely,
Chris Jacobs

[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/pVQ6cV4jJhlASqAhhE4tgw/vApq8926892xsxkDPxMa2Q5wKw) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/ZWT8Crkqf1isErcW3mWUNQ/vApq8926892xsxkDPxMa2Q5wKw)

Hoosier Republican,

We just wrapped up our state convention last week – and as I said, there’s a reason why Indiana Republicans now hold every statewide elected position, both U.S. Senate seats, and seven of Indiana’s U.S. House seats.

Indiana Republicans deliver results!

Well, now in 2020, there’s a battleground race happening in Indiana’s 5th Congressional District – and the Democrats are starting to raise some big out-of-state dollars to pour into this race, all with the goal of stopping our Indiana GOP momentum!

We’ve got the end-of-quarter fundraising deadline coming up on June 30. And to make sure we’re competing with the Democrats dollar-for-dollar, we have partnered with our candidate in the 5^th District – Victoria Spartz.

Will you chip in $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or what you can now before midnight on June 30th? name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump holds joint press conference with President Duda
body:
America and Poland share a long, storied partnership rooted in protecting freedom, democracy, and the rule of law. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f4fcbf9481&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • June 24, 2020
---
| | |
# **President Trump holds joint presser **with President Duda

**President Trump** hosted President Andrzej Duda of Poland at the White House today, where the two leaders held a joint press conference in the Rose Garden.

🎬 [**WATCH: President Trump and President Duda hold joint press conference**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=14645bfab9&e=3ee4985eea)

**America and Poland** share a long, storied partnership rooted in protecting freedom, democracy, and the rule of law. Three years ago in Warsaw, President Trump delivered one of the [defining speeches of his presidency](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c01c94f84c&e=3ee4985eea), calling for courage in the defense of Western civilization against all enemies who seek to destroy it.

**“Through four decades** of communist rule, Poland and the other captive nations of Europe endured a brutal campaign to demolish freedom, your faith, your laws, your history, your identity—indeed, the very essence of your culture and your humanity,” he said.

**“Your oppressors** tried to break you, but Poland could not be broken.”

**Today, the West** faces new challenges, including the scourge of terrorism. Poland is a stalwart NATO ally in this fight, meeting President Trump’s call to contribute 2 percent of its GDP to defense spending. Poland also facilitates critical military training for the United States, showing incredible hospitality and support for the U.S. troops deployed there.

**“I don’t think** we’ve ever been closer to Poland than we are right now,” President Trump said today.

🎬 [President Trump welcomes President Duda in the Oval Office](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=35fa5aa00c&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE** : [President Trump is strengthening America’s partnership with Poland](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2099a847d7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **See the historic child welfare order President Trump just signed**

**More than 400,000** young Americans are in foster care today, including 124,000 who are currently awaiting adoption or some form of permanency. About 20,000 of these young people age out of the system each year without a permanent family.

**These young people** without “forever families” endure a range of heartbreaking outcomes. Forty percent experience homelessness. Half are unemployed by age 24. More than a quarter end up incarcerated, and 1 in 4 face post-traumatic stress disorder.

**America cannot rely** on government alone to care for our nation’s children. Improving our foster care system will take partnerships with private, faith-based, and community organizations to achieve the best outcomes for vulnerable children and families.

**To achieve that** , President Trump just signed a historic child welfare executive order that will strengthen our foster care system in three important ways:

1. **Improve partnerships** between state agencies and public, private, faith-based, and community groups, including by holding states accountable for recruiting an adequate number of homes for all children

2. **Secure resources** for vulnerable families and youth, such as by expanding state access to financial help for guardianships

3. **Increase federal oversight** of requirements that keep children safely out of foster care when possible and ensure a permanent resolution—reunification, adoption, or guardianship—whenever the system must become involved

**President Trump values** solutions that are pro-family, pro-child, and pro-permanency. By encouraging and helping states work with more community partners, those who step up to help America’s children will have a strong system of support.

[_See President Trump’s historic child welfare executive order._](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=702a7fbccc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump****, joined by First Lady Melania Trump, signed a historic**** executive order to strengthen America's foster care system** | June 24, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=40da34cf78&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=85a26d65de&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=aef1f08000)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: One Indiana - what you missed from Eric’s convention speech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
There were so many important points in his big speech that we wanted to send you a few of our favorite clips... Friend, **Last week, Indiana Republicans made history by holding the first-ever Indiana Republican State Convention to be aired to a statewide audience.** Bringing 2,000 of Eric’s fellow Indiana Republicans together for the state convention wasn’t possible this year, but the Governor was still excited to share his vision for building **One Indiana for All.** As he said, **One Indiana for All means providing opportunity for all Hoosiers** – with more Hoosiers back to work, and a modernized state government that runs efficiently for taxpayers. It means finishing I-69 and taking on long-lingering health issues. And it means working together to overcome racial inequities. _**There were so many important points in his big speech (and from his partner, Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch) that we wanted to send you a few of our favorite clips –**_
* **The Hoosier Spirit is Strong:** Hoosiers have remained strong and resilient through it all! We’ve made progress, and we’re on track to make some more. **[Watch as Eric talks about his vision for Indiana.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=cca7625aeb9946b4bbe93c6c9db4ee1c&_e=Up2REYxJ08NuIgo-Y7M2suf6hkvEDhCr3S83sikrMvo7BLV11fVwseOBVOcxPSp9IKFJj_MoYPGOA0WX6VDtNds1mtYPWJITU21vDKfUeEmgGpTOWlO2q9mHooiyU3qtcbysORIe1hOrhUN5DuNPOxA0VVc3yy8HbC_GLJatFptsmq3tuBadN3oK7W1NMQrp_tyh8fYkkpq1dX96Ri9CSz_-8sBG8DTBAaJ-bRh7isppa0E-2hVExzN0nfBdZl9uiVzwwDlstRkCLL_EBqGP5N2YawI6wdWpQCT5nFVWYZjE70_WXo9QP6R7JIMUbE0k5lB1DxhYqx3Sx9FPDEdwMzUA6a1KBkJegEUlhIttZ4Q_GWUJNSghHlx1U0Hdfsb6dZZ-WCeCw_QJe586HhMzUc8j26YV2bzCj-xTtUXX0_I232g0dn--YIpNa2cW38CE)**
* **What Can’t Wait is Urgency:** Indiana has risen to many challenges during Eric’s first term, and he’s ready to rise to the occasion during a second term as well. **[Watch here.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=cca7625aeb9946b4bbe93c6c9db4ee1c&_e=Up2REYxJ08NuIgo-Y7M2suf6hkvEDhCr3S83sikrMvo7BLV11fVwseOBVOcxPSp9xeMQHe6Ed2dCsmnXJ_0xSf9HGoyFvF9Vll5zJr1r8w-dZkS27XfiidZ7neZEw9p32g25iU7DytP2ltXBk4ysNwBEnZeAa0Tir4BrO92BUcRTn1ZOpICC886MJcn45wqRkI0zikc94AoXHe7sepjI8mykQf0QBG3vpufcBqD2xzvR1d2kkKOHK0Zpv2r6rHEpn886GtWDdD4iwhL22u9BdHLsLU--I_sL3iLAyjeUGrxaAZib0wm-wLrReNy5M6DwRrJ2fb-IoCRgcqcAYSdVgiQaP75sOBp0enun_KbGjSOwDD6lQ8_VdUnGwPGTlJMwnynRbzQTIFa8ARBsOQaRzDLMDzU9uZzBnRoLQWEVt9JJ11BZ8flEyqUAqky6xzMA)**
* **Indiana is a Home for Everyone:** Eric said he’s dedicated to creating One Indiana for All! What does that mean? **[Watch this clip.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=cca7625aeb9946b4bbe93c6c9db4ee1c&_e=Up2REYxJ08NuIgo-Y7M2suf6hkvEDhCr3S83sikrMvo7BLV11fVwseOBVOcxPSp9bbri5YvwiQgqDIS2dcZjCIqoO9TfFc1-SZLoTH2SbxRTNO1lKBavrzyVE9a6gagSa2SH6Dela6klEJwAnjQffvxtjD2WkxkBkV8MxpZD9ksu_plGCg66Oxv_n2tQdjPSHjgbDv6eapApga2x70zAMaJ05rNadP1tUhAazpPfYG-tJy0FCT_Y8OgomMSCCxmtCkMduLmS9YwcFovexhgrW6bRI-BOJsnwy_SxMLGfS8UNb9r1JXuYYQPcBwGN1v2dKUmMt83xWQ0hQg05GAEb7pX7uNxw44KJ9a1h09Xeh-H4AW6ZJvAye9UK3x5FO0_H6b2_63VdN0gZrPyyDiIJl9lDB5Q6vKTwB9mWPvhg1_7Mh_nZj6kd2GUPAMz142bH)**

clean_body: There were so many important points in his big speech that we wanted to send you a few of our favorite clips... Friend, Last week, Indiana Republicans made history by holding the first-ever Indiana Republican State Convention to be aired to a statewide audience. Bringing 2,000 of Eric’s fellow Indiana Republicans together for the state convention wasn’t possible this year, but the Governor was still excited to share his vision for building One Indiana for All. As he said, One Indiana for All means providing opportunity for all Hoosiers – with more Hoosiers back to work, and a modernized state government that runs efficiently for taxpayers. It means finishing I-69 and taking on long-lingering health issues. And it means working together to overcome racial inequities. There were so many important points in his big speech (and from his partner, Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch) that we wanted to send you a few of our favorite clips – The Hoosier Spirit is Strong: Hoosiers have remained strong and resilient through it all! We’ve made progress, and we’re on track to make some more. What Can’t Wait is Urgency: Indiana has risen to many challenges during Eric’s first term, and he’s ready to rise to the occasion during a second term as well. Indiana is a Home for Everyone: Eric said he’s dedicated to creating One Indiana for All! What does that mean? Think of All We’ve Accomplished Together: Indiana sets records. And while some of our momentum slowed, we’re revving up again. Let’s Keep Indiana on a Roll: Check out what Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch has to say about writing the next chapter of the Hoosier success story! The Right Leader for the Right Time: The Indiana Republican State Convention panel talked about how Eric is the leader who is making Indiana strong – not just today, but for decades to come. Bonus! Governor Holcomb’s Convention Intro: This video perfectly tells the story of Eric’s leadership for Hoosiers – and how it’s led Indiana through the most difficult of times. Together we’re building One Indiana – and we can’t do it without your help!** -Your Holcomb Crew | | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved. | | Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

subject: Progressives won big last night - and IL-16 is next

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c22d6a200f32/progressives-won-big-last-night-and-il-16-is-next?e=140a9b81e7)

#
Last night we saw just how strong the progressive movement is while the results came back from New York and Kentucky's primary elections.

Progressive Democrats claimed victories in 3 different congressional districts in New York, including Jamaal Bowman's inspiring victory in NY-16. In Kentucky, while we wait for official results, we know that progressive champion Charles Booker is within striking distance of winning his primary for the US Senate.**Democratic voters sent a message last night: it's time to elect progressives. **

As the progressive movement grows throughout this country, momentum for our campaign in IL-16 continues to grow as well. These victories last night are inspiring for so many of us who believe in progressive policies like Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. [**Can you chip in right now to make sure that we keep the momentum going?**](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=63a905c0ac&e=140a9b81e7)

With your support, we will have another progressive victory in IL-16 this November.

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16
